title: GuDoQi 3D Wooden Puzzle, Wood Unicorn Model Kits for Adults Teens to Build, Make Your Own Woodcraft Kit, Hobbies for Adults, Unique Gifts Idea for Birthdays Christmas Father's Day
features: Material: Made of 3 mm thickness natural Basswood plywood, lightweight and durable. Non-toxic and tasteless, safe. Using laser cutting technology, precise and clean, no glue is required during the building process. Once finished, it is in a sturdy structure, no collapse

Need DIY Assembly: You will need pop each piece out from the board and assemble it according to the user manual. It is a wooden DIY project kit, and requires a lot of patience and logic skills during the assembling process. Once finished, you will win a sense of accomplishment, enhancing your self-confidence

Education and Entertainment Value: This 3D wooden model kit is a wonderful craft, because can cultivates patience and attention. It is also a great family game where the process of building the model is fun. Once finished, it will be a good home or office decoration for display, with collection value.

Great Gift Idea: A beautiful model will come out after building, charming and eyes-catching, ideal for home and office decoration. Perfect gift idea for Christmas, Thanksgiving Day, Valentine's Day, birthday, and some other special days to express love and appreciation to your family, friends and people who love 3D wooden models. Also good retirement gifts for mothers and fathers
Tip: Please sand the outer edges of the boards when using them so that they can nestle better with other parts and will be easier to put together.
description: Product Description Great for display and collection. All our 3D wooden models are made in premuim quality natural wood and safe to play with. The building process is with education and entertainment value, while the end result is sturdy and ornamental, with collection value. If you want something different and vintage, then, this is a good choice. Laser Cutting Technology All the wooden pieces are cut by laser, precise and clean. Moreover, the built up model is firm and sturdy, good for long-term display and collection. Extra Wooden Pieces For some small and thin parts, there are some extra pieces for you to replace, in case you have broken them. Easy Understanding Drawings Manual We adopt the manual method with pictures and texts, which is easy for beginners to understand 3D assembled toys. How to Build a 3D Wooden Model? Pop out pieces with parallel force. First, pop out the needed wooden pieces from the correspond board according to the user manual. Please note that, it is advised to pop with parallel force. Build each part separately. Secondly, assemble each part separately according to the user manual instructions. Model numbers are marked on each wooden board and each wooden piece. You can find them easily. Moreover, there are corresponded number on the user manual, too. So, you will not miss it. Smooth and lubricate each bur and gear part. Thirdly, smooth and lubricate the burs and gears fully. For mechanical models, it is very important to smooth and lubricate each bur and gear part well, so that the gears will run smoothly, and, the steam locomotive will run smoothly and far. Putting each part together, a cool 3D wooden model will come out finally. Finally, put each part together in order according to the user manual, then, a cool 3D wooden model will come out. You can give it away as a gift, or, you can keep it for yourself as decoration or collection.
